state_metadata.description: Metadata describing the backing state of the Private Dns and why it may be in an erroneous state.

reported_status.description: Reported status of the Private Dns from backing infrastructure.

reason.description: Reason why the Private Dns may be in an erroneous state, reported from backing infrastructure.
reason.example: Failed to create Private Dns due to invalid Cloud Provider configuration.

state_metadata.title: PrivateDnsStateMetadata

entity_version.description:
Monotonically-increasing version count of the Private DNS, to indicate the order of updates to the
Private DNS.

created_at.description: An RFC-3339 timestamp representation of Private DNS creation date.

updated_at.description: An RFC-3339 timestamp representation of Private DNS update date.
